info.title: SSBot
info.author: fspores
info.details:
Send screenshots from your Nintendo Switch to Telegram directly — no PC needed.

Features

Browse screenshots from emuMMC/RAW1/Nintendo/Album/ with SDL2 GUI
A — send selected screenshot to Telegram (with optional caption)
Y — fullscreen preview
D-Pad — navigation
B — refresh list
PLUS — exit
Lazy loading — only loads visible images
Supports JPEG, PNG, BMP
